title: Cognito Auth
description: Adds Cognito auth to a React website.

examples.description: Use class components instead of functional components

project.description: The root directory of the React website.
project.x-prompt: the root directory for your React website.

cognitoDomain.description: The cognito domain prefix to use. If omitted, a value is derived from the npm scope and website project name.
cognitoDomain.x-prompt: the cognito domain prefix to use i.e: https://{{cognitoDomain}}-123456789.auth.ap-southeast-2.amazoncognito.com (leave blank to derive from scope and project name)

iac.description: The preferred IaC provider. By default this is inherited from your initial selection.
iac.x-prompt: Which provider would you like to manage your infrastructure? (default: inherit)
